title: metrosideros polymorpha subsp. incana
intro: Metrosideros polymorpha subsp. incana, also known as the New Zealand rata, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the myrtle family, native to New Zealand. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Metrosideros polymorpha subsp. incana include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves, which are often used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
